final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen smartphone advertisement banner for a flagship phone launch campaign, designed as a mobile screen screenshot format.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-exposure visual aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout optimized for mobile display, with hero product centered and brand elements prominent
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as the hero product, front-and-center
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, high-contrast backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a premium flagship-launch direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-tech surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9" (large, primary), "OPPO" (brand wordmark)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 portrait format; must read as a realistic mobile full-screen ad screenshot
Avoid: must avoid cluttered layout; must avoid low-end or budget-phone visual cues
